param.name: BreakClauseCustomFrequency
param.description: Break clause custom frequency when break clause frequency is set to Custom. This is used with BreakClauseCustomNum

param.name: BreakClauseCustomNum
param.description: Break clause custom number of custom frequency. Used with BreackClauseCustomFrequency.

param.name: CSACollateralCurrency
param.description: CSA Collateral Currency for the swap deal

param.name: Dv01
param.description: Market value(NPV) sensitivity of the deal to the curve shift

param.name: EffectiveDate
param.description: Date when the instrument takes effect

param.name: EnrichWith
param.description: Optional configuration parameter that specifies what you want the response to be enriched with

param.name: FcmAccountId
param.description: FCM Account Id, second part of CCPI FCM

param.name: FcmClientId
param.description: FCM Client Id, third part of CCPI FCM

param.name: FlipDirection
param.description: Indicates that the direction of the structure should be flipped so that the resultant structure is the inverse of the original

param.name: IsCustomizedSchedule
param.description: This flag indicates any customization on accrual schedule dates (start, end, reset and payment), value(notional, coupon, spread or leverage) and cashflows

param.name: IsMTMSwap
param.description: Indicate whether a xccy swap should mark-to-market

param.name: MifidTradeDate
param.description: Trade date used in daxenrich to calculate TTM

param.name: MinimumStubDays
param.description: Minimum number of days in a valid stub period

param.name: OverrideExistingDeal
param.description: Override the existing deal or not, default is false

param.name: Premium
param.description: Option premium as a percentage of the Notional

param.name: PrincipalExchange
param.description: Defines if any how notionals or principals are exchanged in the contract

param.name: PrivilegedGroup
param.description: List of people with whom the deal is shared with

param.name: ReferenceDate
param.description: Reference date used to create security

param.name: SettlementCurrency
param.description: Settlement currency if settlement type is cash

param.name: Ticker
param.description: Ticker of the deal or underlying

param.name: CompoundingFrequency
param.description: Defines the compounding frequency of the contract

param.name: CustomDateGeneration
param.description: Customized date generation methods: IMM aligns periods dates to IMM dates

param.name: DayCount
param.description: Method used to determine how accrued interest is calculated and how coupon periods are determined

param.name: EffectiveDate
param.description: Date when the instrument takes effect

param.name: FixedRate
param.description: This is the contract rate for forward/cfd type instruments

param.name: IsFxBasedNotional
param.description: Notional is mark-to-market by FX and other leg's notional

param.name: MaturityTenor
param.description: Maturity of the contract. It is the final possible cash flow date for the contract expressed in Tenor. For example 1Y would mean 1 year, 3M means 3 months etc.

param.name: NextLastPaymentDate
param.description: Last coupon payment date prior to the final maturity date coupon payment

param.name: Notional
param.description: Amount associated with the whole transaction

param.name: Notionals
param.description: Amount associated with the entire deal

param.name: PeriodDatesAdjustment
param.description: Defines to which dates a business day adjustment is applied

param.name: SettlementCalendars
param.description: Calendars used to define settlement business dats

param.name: SettlementLagType
param.description: Whether delivery delay depends on calendar or business days

param.name: BackStubHighIndex
param.description: High index used to calculate back stub rate

param.name: BackStubLowIndex
param.description: Low index used to calculate interpolated rate

param.name: FloatingIndex

param.name: FrontStubHighIndex
param.description: High index used to calculate front stub rate

param.name: FrontStubLowIndex
param.description: Low index used to calculate front stub rate

param.name: IsArrears
param.description: Determines is the reset date of the used in the contract is upfront or in Arrears

param.name: Leverage
param.description: Determines the leverage used for the underlying of the contract. A standard contract has a leverage of 1
